markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Smith.ai and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, quality control, and next steps for their collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Quality control issues identified: British English usage, incorrect brand representation, and inaccurate product descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Focus on legal and home services industries for content creation and updates](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Plan to experiment with content refreshes, starting with high-value, industry-specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Design agency engagement upcoming to improve visual content and create templates](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality Control

  - [Issues identified:](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Incorrect use of British English (e.g., "honourable" with a 'u')](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
      - [Misspelling of Smith.ai brand name](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
      - [Inaccurate description of Smith.ai as a VoIP provider](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Irrelevant information in article summaries](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Root cause may be overemphasis on certain details in the company brief](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Programmatic fixes suggested for language preferences and brand name spelling](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Need for human QA to catch nuanced errors before Maddy's review](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Focus on legal and home services industries as top priorities](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [De-emphasize financial advisors and other less relevant verticals](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Expand content to include various service businesses (e.g., veterinarians, salons)](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Highlight Smith.ai's integration capabilities, especially with CRMs](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Consider updating high-potential articles currently ranking for single industries](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Content Refresh Approach

  - [Proposal to split efforts: 50% content refresh, 50% new content generation](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Experiment with refreshing one article to gauge effectiveness and process](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Utilize tools like Ahrefs to identify improvement opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Focus on expanding content, adding new sections, and enriching existing material](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Highlight changes in bold for easy review](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### Visual Content and Design

  - [Temporary use of simple, text-based images approved](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Design agency engagement to create templates for future use](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Goal: develop a branded style that can be easily replicated and varied](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

### Workflow and Collaboration

  - [Maddy to review and sort topics in Airtable's "Considering" category](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Team to propose 10 high-value articles for potential refresh](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Maintain open communication about workload and approval processes](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to compile a list of 10 high-potential articles for refresh and send to Maddy for review](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Team to experiment with content refresh on one approved article](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Maddy to review and sort topics in the "Considering" category in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Await design agency input for improved visual content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Continue refining AI inputs to better represent Smith.ai's brand and offerings](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Focus on clearing the backlog of articles in "Considering" status](https://fathom.video/share/xYGCqEsMy9qeqs_RnSBSPV2pxkd45s5W?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
